mechanics.excerpt: Though even the Star League could not wipe out the human need for conflict, kept disputes between Its member- states under firm control. After Lord Simon Cameron" tragic death in 2751 the rulers of all the member-states served as regents for Simon'$ young son Richard Cameron but unfortu nately abused their positions to jockey for personal power; The lonely Richard turned Stefan Amaris; ruler of the Rim Worlds Republic the far-off Periphery, triendship and advice . Amaris hated the Camerons ad used his false friendship with Richard destroy the Star League trom within.
